caption: A person's hands hold a gold-bordered Steve Carlton baseball card, showcasing an image of the player in a red cap and white jersey. The card features a signature and the text "15/20" and "STEVE CARLTON". In the background, a man wearing a dark blue t-shirt sits at a desk with computer equipment, including a monitor. The setting is decorated with a colorful mat featuring green palm trees and orange accents. On-screen logos for "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible in the upper right of the frames. As the sequence progresses, the person holding the card shifts their grip slightly, moving the card across the field of view. The man in the background remains seated, looking toward the person holding the card, while the surrounding environment and equipment stay static.
